inferred_constraints: 1 <= paragraph.length <= 1000; punctuation in !?',;.; 0 <= banned.length <= 100; banned[i] lowercase
input_format: line1: paragraph (JSON string); line2: banned (JSON array of strings)

testcases.input:
"Bob hit a ball, the hit BALL flew far after it was hit."
["hit"]

testcases.desc: Edge: all uppercase distinct, last word wins ties (but unique by guarantee — only first)

testcases.input:
"red blue red red green blue red"
["blue"]

"The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The fox is quick."
["the"]

"a a a a a b b b b c c c"
["a"]

"word word word word word word word word word word other"
["word"]

"Bob Bob Bob bob bob bob bob alice"
[]
